content: Gapless music loops: MP3 encoding inserts leading/trailing silence (encoder delay) so looping MP3 always has an audible seam; HTML5 <audio loop> also adds a gap. Fixes: use OGG (loops perfectly in Web Audio buffer loop=true) or WAV, trim silence in an editor before export, and loop via Web Audio AudioBufferSourceNode rather than the media element. Sources: SeamlessLoop repo, kevssite seamless looping, Gearspace gapless MP3 thread.
